caption: A man wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a striped tie speaks into a handheld microphone while gesturing with his left hand. He is positioned in a tiered seating area, surrounded by other attendees. To his left, a woman with blonde hair wearing a white blazer smiles, with a laptop featuring a white Apple logo visible in front of her. Behind him, other individuals in dark professional attire observe, including a woman holding a white piece of paper. The man’s expression shifts as he speaks, and his hand movements transition from an open gesture to touching his face. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, and the background remains static, showing the grey fabric of the seating and the professional clothing of the crowd. No legible text is present on the screen.
